description: Supersedes bl-505f's src/next/ alongside-quarantine. Per owner: this is a dev repo; the system-installed bl is the self-hoster, so main need not stay operationally live. Replace in place — new minimal main.rs/lib.rs at crate root, bl dispatches the §8 verb->op entrypoint (Verb/OpClass/Op::phases), ALL ~140 legacy modules + old tests/ deleted (recoverable from git history). Tests bootstrap a /tmp repo and exec the freshly-built binary by path. main builds a stub bl during the 16-phase build; don't make install until cutover.
title: Greenfield skeleton (in-place): new crate root + §8 dispatch, old src deleted
